semantic.role: Development build watcher script that polls for source file changes and triggers automatic rebuilds.
responsibilities: Monitoring specified source directories and files for modifications
Rebuilding the project via npm run build whenever changes are detected
Queuing build requests and preventing concurrent executions

English.purpose: Provide a development-time auto-rebuild mechanism that watches source files and rebuilds the project on change, reducing manual recompilation for developers.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for ArchSpine developers working on the core tooling, who need immediate feedback when modifying TypeScript source code, build scripts, or configuration files.
key_takeaways: Automatically rebuilds on file changes with a 1-second polling interval
Queues build requests to avoid overlapping builds
Covers src/, build scripts, tsconfig, and package.json

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 提供一个开发时期的自动重建机制，用于监控源文件的变化并在检测到改动时自动触发项目重建，从而减少开发人员的手动编译操作。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向 ArchSpine 核心工具的开发人员，他们在修改 TypeScript 源代码、构建脚本或配置文件时，需要即时获得重建反馈。
key_takeaways: 以 1 秒轮询间隔自动检测文件更改并触发重建
通过队列机制避免并发构建冲突
监控范围包括 src/ 目录、构建脚本、tsconfig 和 package.json
